message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

class DayLog {
    - Integer id
    - LocalDateTime dateTime
    - ArrayList<Log> logs
    + DayLog(ArrayList<Log> logs)
    + void outputToStdout()
}

class Log {
    - Integer id
    - LocalDateTime dateTime
    - ArrayList<Task> tasks
    + Log(ArrayList<Task> tasks)
    + void addTask(Task task)
    + void removeTask(Integer int)
}

class Task {
    - Integer id
    - String name
    - String description
    - LocalDateTime dateTime
    - TaskType type
    + Task(String name, String description, TaskType type)
    + String toString()
    .. Getters ..
    + void getName()
    + void getDescription()
    + void getType()
}

interface IInsertToDatabase {
    + void insertToDatabase()
}

enum TaskType {
    RESEARCH
    CODING
    DESIGN
}

DayLog *-- "*" Log
Log *-- "*" Task
Task ..|> IInsertToDatabase
Log ..|> IInsertToDatabase
DayLog ..|> IInsertToDatabase

@enduml
```
